subject: A muscular pale humanoid figure with pointed ears raising both arms as swirling golden flame energy spirals from each hand
description: A mid-shot of a bare-chested, muscular humanoid figure with visibly pointed ears and pale gray-white skin. Both arms are raised and spread, and from each hand enormous spiraling rings of golden flame energy radiate outward and fill the frame. The figure wears a broad leather belt with a large gold medallion or buckle and a cape — possibly white or pale — trailing behind. The face is calm, neutral, composed in the act of channeling power outward rather than displaying exertion. The background is a warm pale gray. The spiral forms of the energy dominate the composition.
foreground: Spiraling golden energy rings from both hands
emotion: composed power; the figure radiates authority and divine energy without exertion or expression
